subject: refactor(storage): extract safeStorage utility, migrate all consumers
body:
Four call sites each reinvented their own try/catch wrapper around
localStorage (theme.ts inlined safeGet/safeSet, recentTones.ts,
TemplateSelector.tsx, usePWAInstall.ts analytics). Consolidate per the
glow-props THEME_DARK_MODE pattern so there's one place to handle
SecurityError (sandboxed iframes, disabled storage, enterprise lockdowns)
— and one place to add telemetry later if we need visibility into
storage failures.

- New src/utils/safeStorage.ts: safeStorageGet/Set/Remove. String-only
  API — callers still own (de)serialization.
- theme.ts: drop inline safeGet/safeSet, import shared wrappers.
- recentTones.ts: now safe in sandboxed iframes; JSON-parse errors handled
  locally (array shape validation stays with the caller).
- TemplateSelector.tsx: upload-hash dedup + record now use safeStorage;
  readHashes helper deduplicates the parse+validate logic.
- usePWAInstall.ts (analytics): migrate localStorage calls; sessionStorage
  dismiss tracking left inline since the pattern scopes safeStorage to
  localStorage and only two sessionStorage sites exist.

Tags: refactor, storage, pattern-compliance
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
